name: Home Charger
shortDescription: Sleek wall charger with signature glowing ring.
fullDescription: The EVALIS Home Charger delivers up to 22 kW of charging power with dynamic load management and smart scheduling features via the dashboard.

name: Charging Cable
fullDescription: Perfect for public charging. Durable, weather-resistant Type 2 cable with a carrying bag, providing maximum throughput up to 32A.

name: Key Card
fullDescription: EVALIS NFC/RFID Key Card is a durable backup key that fits easily in your wallet. Program it via the in-car display.

name: All-Weather Floor Mats
fullDescription: Tough, all-weather rubber floor mats designed to custom fit Vector, Cloud, or Bullet. Easy to wash and scrape clean.

name: EVALIS Premium Tire Set
shortDescription: Low rolling resistance tires for maximum EV efficiency.
fullDescription: Developed specifically for EVALIS vehicles to minimize road noise and optimize driving range. High grip rating in dry and wet environments.

name: Vector Weatherproof Car Cover
shortDescription: Custom-fit outdoor cover for the Vector sedan.
fullDescription: Tailored to the exact silhouette of the Vector, this weatherproof cover shields your sedan from UV rays, rain, and dust with a soft-lined interior that protects the paint finish.

name: Bullet Weatherproof Motorcycle Cover
shortDescription: Custom-fit outdoor cover for the Bullet motorcycle.
fullDescription: Engineered to match the Bullet's profile, this heavy-duty cover protects against rain, UV exposure, and dust with reflective safety piping and a lockable base strap.

name: All-Terrain Snow Chains
shortDescription: Emergency traction chains for winter driving.
fullDescription: Quick-fit steel snow chains engineered for EVALIS wheel sizes, delivering reliable traction on icy and snow-covered roads without compromising ride comfort.

name: EVALIS Portable Power Station
shortDescription: 3.2 kWh mobile battery with AC, DC, and USB outputs.
fullDescription: A compact 3.2 kWh power station with AC, DC, USB-A, and USB-C outputs, ideal for camping, worksites, or emergency backup power away from the grid.
